mapper.sql: select ss.id, ss.settlement_date as settlementDate, ss.app_code as appCode, a.app_name as appName, ss.enterprise_subject_id as enterpriseSubjectId, s.subject_name as subjectName, ss.channel_code as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, ss.trade_amount as tradeAmount, ss.refund_amount as refundAmount, ss.fee_amount as feeAmount, ss.net_amount as netAmount, ss.trade_count as tradeCount, ss.refund_count as refundCount, ss.unresolved_difference_count as unresolvedDifferenceCount, ss.unresolved_difference_amount as unresolvedDifferenceAmount, ss.status, ss.generated_by as generatedBy, ss.generated_by_name as generatedByName, ss.generated_at as generatedAt, ss.confirmed_by as confirmedBy, ss.confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, ss.confirmed_at as confirmedAt, ss.voided_by as voidedBy, ss.voided_by_name as voidedByName, ss.voided_at as voidedAt, ss.void_reason as voidReason, ss.created_at as createTime, ss.updated_at as updateTime

from payment_settlement_summary ss left join payment_application a on (a.app_id = ss.app_code or ss.app_code = case when a.app_id = 'app_order_center' then 'ORDER_CENTER' when a.app_id = 'app_member_center' then 'MEMBER_CENTER' else a.app_id end) and a.tenant_id = ss.tenant_id and a.del_flag = 0 left join payment_enterprise_subject s on s.id = ss.enterprise_subject_id and s.tenant_id = ss.tenant_id and s.del_flag = 0 left join payment_channel c on c.channel_code = ss.channel_code and c.tenant_id = ss.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0
mapper.select: order by ss.settlement_date desc, ss.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select ss.id, ss.settlement_date as settlementDate, ss.app_code as appCode, ss.enterprise_subject_id as enterpriseSubjectId, ss.channel_code as channelCode, ss.trade_amount as tradeAmount, ss.refund_amount as refundAmount, ss.fee_amount as feeAmount, ss.net_amount as netAmount, ss.trade_count as tradeCount, ss.refund_count as refundCount, ss.unresolved_difference_count as unresolvedDifferenceCount, ss.unresolved_difference_amount as unresolvedDifferenceAmount, ss.status, ss.generated_by as generatedBy, ss.generated_by_name as generatedByName, ss.generated_at as generatedAt, ss.confirmed_by as confirmedBy, ss.confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, ss.confirmed_at as confirmedAt, ss.voided_by as voidedBy, ss.voided_by_name as voidedByName, ss.voided_at as voidedAt, ss.void_reason as voidReason, ss.tenant_id as tenantId, ss.created_by as createdBy, ss.created_at as createdAt, ss.updated_by as updatedBy, ss.updated_at as updatedAt, ss.del_flag as delFlag from payment_settlement_summary ss where ss.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ss.settlement_date = #{settlementDate} and ss.app_code = #{appCode} and ss.enterprise_subject_id = #{enterpriseSubjectId} and ss.channel_code = #{channelCode} and ss.status != 'VOIDED' and ss.del_flag = 0 order by ss.created_at desc limit 1

select coalesce(sum(case when bd.trade_type = 'PAYMENT' then bd.amount else 0 end), 0) as tradeAmount, coalesce(sum(case when bd.trade_type = 'REFUND' then bd.amount else 0 end), 0) as refundAmount, coalesce(sum(bd.fee), 0) as feeAmount, coalesce(sum(case when bd.trade_type = 'PAYMENT' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as tradeCount, coalesce(sum(case when bd.trade_type = 'REFUND' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as refundCount from payment_channel_bill_detail bd left join payment_order po on po.channel_trade_no = bd.channel_trade_no and po.tenant_id = bd.tenant_id left join payment_refund_order ro on ro.channel_refund_no = bd.channel_trade_no and ro.tenant_id = bd.tenant_id left join payment_order rpo on rpo.id = ro.payment_order_id and rpo.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id left join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = coalesce(po.business_order_id, rpo.business_order_id) and bo.tenant_id = bd.tenant_id where bd.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bd.bill_date = #{settlementDate} and bd.channel_code = #{channelCode} and bd.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code = #{appCode} and bo.subject_id = #{enterpriseSubjectId} and ( (bd.trade_type = 'PAYMENT' and po.status = 'SUCCESS') or (bd.trade_type = 'REFUND' and ro.status = 'SUCCESS') or bd.trade_type = 'FEE' )

select coalesce(count(1), 0) as unresolvedDifferenceCount, coalesce(sum(d.difference_amount), 0) as unresolvedDifferenceAmount from payment_difference d join payment_reconciliation r on r.id = d.reconciliation_id and r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and r.del_flag = 0 where d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and r.bill_date = #{settlementDate} and r.channel_code = #{channelCode} and d.process_status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING') and d.del_flag = 0
mapper.update: update payment_settlement_summary set trade_amount = #{tradeAmount}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, fee_amount = #{feeAmount}, net_amount = #{netAmount}, trade_count = #{tradeCount}, refund_count = #{refundCount}, unresolved_difference_count = #{unresolvedDifferenceCount}, unresolved_difference_amount = #{unresolvedDifferenceAmount}, status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}, confirmed_by_name = #{confirmedByName}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, updated_by = #{confirmedBy}, updated_at = #{confirmedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'GENERATED' and del_flag = 0

update payment_settlement_summary set status = 'VOIDED', voided_by = #{voidedBy}, voided_by_name = #{voidedByName}, voided_at = #{voidedAt}, void_reason = #{voidReason}, updated_by = #{voidedBy}, updated_at = #{voidedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'CONFIRMED' and del_flag = 0
